title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates:
Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates!
